steps.notes: Cross-collection search spike complete. SearchIndexService.rebuildAll() indexes 8 collections (notes, books, music, cookinglist, readinglist, watchlist, todolist, socialposts) into SQLite FTS5. 5,672 items indexed at startup. Collection filter dropdown added to /search. POST /api/search/rebuild endpoint for manual re-index.

Architecture review: SQLite FTS5 approach is sound. 8 collections mapped correctly to ontology. Three minor items for follow-up: (1) async rebuild path for >50K items, (2) soft-delete sync gap between pods and search index, (3) FTS5 operator sanitization. None are blockers. Advance.
